retry_reason: Function allocates memory and returns NULL on failure; retry may succeed if memory is freed, but this is not relevant as the function is not a refcount wrapper.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to allocate and construct a netlink skb for vendor commands, not to manage any reference count. The only refcount operation is an internal cleanup kfree_skb on error paths.
